name: GizmoCraft World Sync Modpack
install: Put mods/gizmocraft-world-sync-client-0.2.0.jar in your Minecraft mods folder. Do not put manifest.json or README.md in mods.

sharedMemory.description: Discovered world coverage and live client telemetry are recorded once through the GizmoCraft bridge and exposed to the dashboard as shared map memory.

capabilities: sends live player position every 5 seconds while in-world
sends visited chunk heartbeats for shared dashboard coverage
